sn14.3:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, it is in dependence on the diversity of elements that there arises the diversity of contacts. The diversity of elements does not arise in dependence on the diversity of contacts.
sn14.3:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the diversity of elements? The eye element … the mind element. This is called the diversity of elements.
sn14.3:2.2:
2
"And how is it, bhikkhus, that in dependence on the diversity of elements there arises the diversity of contacts; that the diversity of elements does not arise in dependence on the diversity of contacts?
sn14.3:2.3:
"In dependence on the eye element there arises eye-contact; the eye element does not arise in dependence on eye-contact … . In dependence on the mind element there arises mind-contact; the mind element does not arise in dependence on mind-contact.
It is in this way, bhikkhus, that in dependence on the diversity of elements there arises the diversity of contacts; that the diversity of elements does not arise in dependence on the diversity of contacts."
